author: maxine--futura
content:
Design document written: .design/084-architectural-refactoring.md

Key discovery during design: batched iteration (ordered/shuffled with batch_size) silently drops filter/map stages — _post_wrap_stages() is only applied in unbatched paths. This is a correctness bug, added to Phase 1.

5 phases proposed:
- Phase 1: Dataset pipeline extraction + batched filter bug fix (independent)
- Phase 2: DatasetMeta parameter objects (independent)
- Phase 3: Index internal delegation + AppView fallback + temporal coupling (depends on P2)
- Phase 4: Redis label bug + N+1 query + SQLite indexes (independent)
- Phase 5: Atmosphere namespacing + deprecation cleanup + thread safety + StubManager split (depends on P3)

Phases 1, 2, 4 can be worked in parallel.
